creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #31)

I had the opportunity to quickcheck lang/pocl 6.0 as provided by the patchfile above on one of our poudriere builders, running 14.2-RELENG-p2 (as well as 14-STABLE and CURRENT, recent versions).

The build performed cleanly from scratch building 142 ports including pocl! The package provided also can be installed and deleted - as requested by QM.

I'm puzzled by "kernel-x86_64-portbld-" in your log - it should be "amd64" instead of x86_64. Are you sure you're using the latest patch and an up-to-date builder? I can not reproduce the error of yours.
